## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No user data is logged or exposed
- [ ] All inputs are validated
- [ ] Authentication is required (if applicable)
- [ ] Authorization is enforced (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets/keys are hardcoded
- [ ] CSP headers are respected

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No new data collection without consent
- [ ] Data lifecycle is documented
- [ ] On-device processing is preferred (if applicable)

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Screen reader tested
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA
- [ ] Touch targets are at least 44x44px
- [ ] Text is resizable

## Documentation

- [ ] ADR updated (if architecture decision)
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] PRD updated (if feature change)

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from issue met
- [ ] Edge cases handled
- [ ] Error states handled
- [ ] Loading states handled
- [ ] Privacy review completed (if applicable)
- [ ] Security review completed (if applicable)

Anything the reviewer should know.
